CustomField.description: DPDP consent flag (REQ-046, design §2.3/§6.7) — true once the patient/booker has affirmatively agreed to the consent notice at registration. THIS TICKET (VS-07) DEFINES THE FIELD ONLY: enforcement that a patient cannot be used for booking without VS_Consent_Given__c = true is built in VS_PatientService.findOrCreate() (VS-10). The consent notice/copy text shown to the citizen is NOT built in this ticket (no screen exists yet); when it is built, per D-024 it must be a Custom Label prefixed "[[DRAFT - pending department approval]]", never hardcoded text. Default false — consent must be an explicit opt-in, never assumed.
CustomField.label: Consent Given
